meta.homeDescription: Browse featured products and shop with React, Vite, and Laravel.
meta.loginDescription: Sign in to your account to access the dashboard and protected areas.
meta.unauthorizedDescription: You do not have permission to access this page. Sign in or use an account with the right role.
meta.accountDescription: View your account details, session information, and sign out.
meta.cartDescription: Review items in your shopping cart before checkout.
meta.notFoundDescription: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
meta.adminDescription: Administrator dashboard for managing users, orders, and products.

home.heroBenefits: Fast delivery • Easy returns • Secure checkout
home.heroTitle: Everything you need for a modern lifestyle.
home.heroDescription: Discover curated essentials, trending picks, and deals that feel too good to be true. Built for speed, designed for trust.

auth.expectsCookie: expects HttpOnly session cookie from the API
auth.noSessionCookie: No session cookie detected. Your Laravel API returns a Bearer token in JSON, not HttpOnly cookies. Set VITE_AUTH_STRATEGY=bearer_memory in .env and restart the dev server.
auth.noToken: Login response did not include a token. Expected Laravel sendResponse data.token or data.access_token.
auth.fallbackAdmin: This is a role-specific fallback page. You can point it to the normal login flow or a separate admin login UI.
auth.fallbackSeller: Role-specific fallback page for seller routes.

errors.notFoundBody: The page you're looking for has vanished into the digital void. Let's get you back on track.
errors.unexpectedError: We hit an unexpected error. You can reload the app or go back home.
errors.unauthorizedBody: You don't have permission to access this page.

dashboard.userStub: Replace this with user pages (profile, addresses, orders, etc.).
dashboard.buyerStub: Replace this with buyer pages (wishlists, orders, addresses, etc.).
dashboard.sellerStub: Replace this with seller pages (inventory, orders, payouts, etc.).
dashboard.vendorStub: Replace this with vendor pages (stores, listings, fulfillment, etc.).

admin.adminStub: Replace this with your admin pages (users, orders, products, etc.).

account.cookieNotStored: (HttpOnly cookie - token never stored in JS)

cart.cartStub: Cart page stub (wire to backend later)
